title: Crispy Warak Enab Fritters
description: A crispy and savory fritter made with warak enab, perfect for snacking. This recipe is an innovative twist on traditional Indian street food.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chopped warak enab and middle eastern enab.
In a small bowl, mix Eastern spice blend, lemon juice and salt. Pour over the enab mixture and toss to coat.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop the enab mixture into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle crispy fried onions over the fritters and serve hot.
Repeat the process until all the enab mixture is used up.
